response.content: Hello! I'm your LangGraph-powered assistant. I can help you manage proverbs, get weather information, and more. What would you like to do?
The weather in New York is 70 degrees with clear skies, 45% humidity, 5 mph wind, and feels like 72 degrees. A great day to be outside!

You're currently running against aimock (a mock LLM server). This response is a catch-all for requests that don't match any test fixture. To use a real LLM: (1) Add your OPENAI_API_KEY to .env, (2) Remove or unset OPENAI_BASE_URL from your environment so requests go to OpenAI instead of aimock, (3) Restart with `npm run dev`.
